song.title: Hosanna
song.presentation: V1 P C V2 P C E
song.lyrics:
[v1] . D G D 1) Praise is rising eyes are turning to You,|we turn to You . D G D Hope is stirring hearts are yearning for You,|we long for You [p] Pre-Chorus . A G D 'Cause when we see You we find strength|to face the day . A G D A In Your presence all our fears|are washed away, washed away [C] Chorus . Dsus D Bm7 G Hosanna hosanna . D A You are the God who saves us . Bm7 G Worthy of all our praises . Dsus D Bm7 G Hosanna hosanna . D A Come have Your way among us . Bm7 G We welcome You here Lord Jesus [v2] . D G D 2) Hear the sound of hearts returning to You,|we turn to You .D G D In Your kingdom broken lives are made new,|You make us new
[E] 1) Praise is rising eyes are turning to You, we turn to You Hope is stirring hearts are yearning for You, we long for You Pre-Chorus 'Cause when we see You we find strength to face the day In Your presence all our fears are washed away, washed away Chorus Hosanna hosanna You are the God who saves us Worthy of all our praises Hosanna hosanna Come have Your way among us We welcome You here Lord Jesus 2) Hear the sound of hearts returning to You, we turn to You In Your kingdom broken lives are made new, You make us new
